resources.string: Morning bodyweight and evening training reminders
Tap to open the app and log your weight.
Tap to record a PR or training.

string-array.name: reminder_bw_aggressive_texts
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, step on the scale already.
dumba***, your weight is not going to log itself.
lazy***, open the app and stop ghosting the scale.
soft***, punch in your weight before I lose patience.
Move it jacka***, the scale misses you. Log it.
cupcake, your weight will not log itself.
numb***, still avoiding the scale? Log your bodyweight.
buttercup, open PRyx and punch in your weight.
champ, you are not too busy for one number.
sunshine, step on the scale and log it.
princess, the scale is waiting. Log your bodyweight.

string-array.name: reminder_lift_aggressive_texts
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, get under the bar and log a lift.
dumba***, stop scrolling and log your training.
lazy***, open the app and record a lift already.
weak***, your PRs will not write themselves. Log one.
soft***, gym called. It wants a logged lift.
Time to work jacka***. Log a lift in PRyx.
cupcake, put the phone down and log a lift.
numb***, get under the bar and log something.
buttercup, open PRyx and punch in a lift.
champ, you are not done. Log your training.
sunshine, stop making excuses and log a lift.
princess, the bar is waiting. Log a lift.
